blockingIssues.description: The follow-up i18n audit is still incomplete. Hardcoded English accessibility labels remain in `InstallDialog`, `CollectionInstallDialog`, `SkillPickerDialog`, `CollectionPickerDialog`, and the shared dialog close button, so Chinese mode still leaks untranslated screen-reader text outside the locale resources.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update the scrutiny review/validator procedure so Task-spawned `scrutiny-feature-reviewer` subagents can run with automatic execution approval in this worker environment, or provide a documented manual-review fallback.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: In this ui-overhaul re-run, the Task invocation for `fix-i18n-persistence-and-coverage` again exited with `Exec ended early: insufficient permission to proceed`, so the validator had to review the fix manually from the commit diff and current source state instead of using the required reviewer subagent.
